productDisplayName: ADIDAS Neo Men Derby White Shoes
description: The adidas derby have a simplistic, stylish design featuring the adidas 3 stripes in a distinctive style to either side along with the Adidas logos to the outer heel, heel counter and tongue. Featuring Vibe Complete comfort around the ankle, underfoot, and in those high-wear areas, they give you the comfort you need to attack the day with.UpperComplete leather upper for professional usageSynthetic textile lining for great durabilityCentral lace-up Fit for comfortable customised fitPadded tongue and collar for snug fitPerforation on the midfoot for ventilationAdidas branding on synthetic patch over heel cupMidsoleFull length midsole for lightweight structureVibeComplete enhanced cushioning on the insole for a comfortable feelSoft, cushy footbed for great comfort all dayOutsoleExternal heel counter provides even more ankle protectionRubber outsole provides abrasion resistant support and protection for whole footHigh-traction tread pattern equipped with pivot point for maximum mobilityshoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a branded shoe polish to keep your leather footwear clean and shineStore away from sunlight
